title: Naokos death
wikitext:
[]: Naoko's death             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Mar 18, 2007 9:59 pm from the first moment I saw it, I was certain that Gendou had killed her. Never a question about it. Is this something of hot debate or do people believe it was suicide? I started thinking of this after reading a post of Reichu Reichu wrote: A lot of things in NGE aren't "explicitly stated". If we're going to go into the territory of Naoko being murdered instead of killing herself, we may as well pull out Fuzzy Chickens' claims that Rei 1 wasn't strangled to death, but simply passed out.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Mar 18, 2007 10:02 pm Last I heard, it was pretty much a given that old lady Akagi chucked herself over the edge.

[]: Re: Naoko's death             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 18, 2007 10:04 pm slothen wrote: Is this something of hot debate or do people believe it was suicide?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Mar 18, 2007 10:15 pm I never read any more into it other than it was a suicide.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 18, 2007 10:18 pm faces: Naoko gets called an old hag, this doesn't phase her all that much, but when Rei I says that's what Gendo calls her, she's a bit shocked: There's a weird tripped out bit where what Rei just said sinks in Then she finally realizes who it is that Rei reminded her of (from their first meeting) Naoko completely loses her shit and starts choking Rei I, notice the vengeance in her eyes After Rei I goes limp, she snaps out of it Then the fact that she just choked a child to death finally sinks in Immediately following is the sound of a body falling to the ground, followed by a "squish". Looks like a suicide to me... If anything further can be read, one can ask whether Rei was really just lost or if Gendo sent her.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Mar 18, 2007 10:44 pm ahh, for some reason i thought gunshot.... jumping off never even occured to me. I'm going to watch that scene again..

[]:             Quote Post by Houndour » Sun Mar 18, 2007 11:46 pm Ornette wrote: If anything further can be read, one can ask whether Rei was really just lost or if Gendo sent her.

[]: Re: Naoko's death             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 19, 2007 4:58 am slothen wrote: it seemed fitting. Naoko sexx0rs Gendou, Naoko kills Rei, Gendou kills Naoko. Then Ritsuko Sexx0rs Gendou, Ritsuko kills Reis, Gendou kills Ritsuko.

[]: Re: Naoko's death             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 19, 2007 6:12 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: I always assumed it was suicide. All the evidence points to suicide. But screw that, I like how nice and connecty the "murder" explanation is. So I'm gonna go with that one just because it fits so pretty.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 19, 2007 6:27 am I reject your reality and substitute my own. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 19, 2007 6:52 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: I reject the show's reality and substitute my own. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 19, 2007 6:55 am Like NGE has only ONE reality. Pshhh. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 19, 2007 7:27 am I was attempting to make a point. When considerations of evidence go out the window, everything is game and something like fem-Kaworu becomes a Full-Fledged Theory. And you wouldn't want that ... would you?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Mar 19, 2007 7:47 am Reichu wrote: I was attempting to make a point. When considerations of evidence go out the window, everything is game and something like fem-Kaworu becomes a Full-Fledged Theory. And you wouldn't want that ... would you?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 19, 2007 10:56 am Ornette wrote: If anything further can be read, one can ask whether Rei was really just lost or if Gendo sent her.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Mon Mar 19, 2007 12:41 pm Just skimming through real quickly, but I think this thread is about Rei killing Naoko (or whatever her name is). Lemme just say that that WAS what I initially thought when I first saw the scene.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 19, 2007 1:41 pm its funny how we all though different things. I thought Gendou shot Naoko, we have Naoko jumping, Gendou pushing Naoko, and Rei gaining super powers and killing Naoko, and then dying herself.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 19, 2007 2:20 pm I doubt Gendo had Rei do that for him. If anything, Rei-chan probably overheard Gendo muttering to himself and possibly thought Naoko getting mad was some type of game. Notice the smile on her face. The fact she's only 4 or 5, I doubt she's THAT "evil", despite the personality differences between her and the two elder clones. Espeically considering the fact Gendo made Rei to begin with, I'd doubt he wanted to go through the trouble of making another clone. Though being able to place Rei I in zerogoki must have been helpful. ; Reichu wrote: I was attempting to make a point. When considerations of evidence go out the window, everything is game and something like fem-Kaworu becomes a Full-Fledged Theory. And you wouldn't want that... would you?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 19, 2007 2:27 pm ah you're right, Gendou sending Rei to die fits with the Rei in unit 00 theory, a theory im not too familiar with.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Mar 19, 2007 2:29 pm Gendou is always going to be plausable suspect here, but unless someone can offer some very compelling evidence to support this accusation( not parallelism), the verdict is going to remain suicide.
